title: Afrosolen erongoensis
taxonomy: Afrosolen erongoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is native to the Erongo Mountains of Namibia. The classification of Afrosolen erongoensis is as follows: it belongs to the genus Afrosolen, which is a group of bulbous perennials. This genus is part of the subfamily Agapanthoideae within the Amaryllidaceae family. Further classification places Afrosolen erongoensis as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
